title: Wanda and Carrot Warn of Whale Forest
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on wanda and carrot warn of whale forest within the The Mink Tribe and Jack's Ruin storyline.
scene: The crew encounters the Mink Tribe, Heart Pirates, and the aftermath of Jack's attack, turning the search for Sanji's group urgent.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's the deal with that weapon...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: For a second, I felt electricity coursing through me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The strange and mysterious Mink race!

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: InVaders in whale Forest!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you serious!? This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: They're going to anger the guardians!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are these things human? Animal perhaps...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: O... Oi! You! Where in the hell...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Did you get those clothes!? What have you done with Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe they are a race that dines on humans.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Why is it always worst case scenario with you!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Gyaaaah! I'm sorry! Trust me, I taste awful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What jumping power...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So this is the physical ability of the Mink race, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whoa AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: How's it looking!? Do you see anything, Carrot!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There it is! I think we might be a little late, though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just out- side of Claw City! They're definitely going at it in whale Forest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Dang it, I knew it!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: We gotta hurry! Let's go, croccy!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Get on, Carrot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Kay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have time to babysit you lot as well! Pay close attention to what I'm about to tell you!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Continue towards the right from here, through right butt forest. Turn left at deep dark swamp!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Continue on until you reach right belly forest! You should find the corpses of your friends there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What AAAAA AAA AT!?

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Wait there at right belly forest! We'll be coming for you after- wards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are they gonna be okay? Those guys...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They're the "Straw hat pirates!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WHATA-!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're in for quite the shock, that's for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no helping that! What's happened has happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The person who's just trespassed into whale Forest is in all likeli-hood...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He might be their captain, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We shall show him no mercy.

summary: Wanda and Carrot Warn of Whale Forest: Luffy's group meets Wanda, Carrot, Pedro, Bepo and the Mink guardians while learning that Jack destroyed the Mokomo Dukedom and that Sanji's group may still be alive.
